## What's missing?
Describe the capability you'd like.

## Which channel/agent?
Meta Ads / SEO / Social Media / Infrastructure / New

## How would this help?
What problem does it solve or what workflow does it improve?

## Suggested approach
If you have ideas on implementation, share them here.
